artPrompt: A frozen action moment as a single ring arcs toward a forest of oversized carnival pegs, glancing off mid-flight in a spray of hot-gold sparks, the targeted creature flinching in the lurid neon glow of a rigged sideshow stall. Tattered red bunting and scattered dice haze into smoky black behind. Tense, kinetic film-still framing of a fixed game, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Rigged Ring Toss
text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Then roll a six-sided die. On a 6, the ring 'mysteriously' bounces off — that creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn instead.
flavorText: The pegs are slightly too big for the rings. On purpose.
